The 1st ODI of the Australia Tour of Pakistan 2026 marks the start of a three-match Odi series. Watch Pakistan vs Australia 1st Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, Pakistan cricket team featuring Babar Azam and Shaheen Afridi focusing on balance and pace control. Australia, led by Mitchell Marsh, rely on experienced players such as Adam Zampa & Matt Short to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.

Watch Paris Saint-Germain vs Arsenal FC live on tapmad in the final of the UEFA Champions League. After an incredible European campaign, both clubs now stand one match away from lifting the most prestigious trophy in club football. PSG aim to finally secure European glory, while Arsenal look to complete a historic run with a championship-winning performance. Expect intense action, elite talent, and unforgettable moments as two football giants clash on the biggest stage. Stream the UCL Final live in HD on tapmad via app, web, or smart TV.
